scores.notes: Correct implementation. Uses self.on[PROVIDES_RELATION].relation_joined, writes to event.relation.data[self.unit], all imports are module-level. Adds model.get_binding()/ingress_address as primary FQDN source with socket.getfqdn() fallback — both are real APIs used correctly. Extra config_changed handler and logging are valid additions, not hallucinations. Slightly more complex than gold standard but entirely correct.
